examples: Objective To explore a new surgical approach for the renovation of laryngotracheal stenosis.
Objective To establish a simple and stable rabbit model of cicatricial laryngotracheal stenosis.
Objective To explore the treatment and prognosis on patients with laryngotracheal invasion by well-differentiated thyroid carcinoma (DTC).
We congratulate Professor Macchiarini for achieving another world's first in regenerative medicine--the world's first laryngotracheal transplants.
